description: Banners added in FRAC-184 (PR #223) overlap with hero text and the Luma iframe on the events, visit, and education pages because those pages have full-width content (unlike CampusPage where the OctahedronHero is narrow). User chose 'constrain page content width' — keep banners at campus-page scale, but add horizontal padding on md+ so content stays inside the banner-free zone. Also hide banners on mobile (<md) where there isn't enough viewport room for both.
title: Fix banner/content overlap on events, visit, education pages (FRAC-184 follow-up)
